vBRIEFInfo.description: Scaffold generated by deft-directive-swarm Phase 0 from GitHub issue #576. Full acceptance criteria live in the referenced GitHub issue body.

plan.title: docs(meta/lessons): codify 5 RC3 validation lessons into deft/meta/lessons.md (drop-in content; swarm-ready)

narratives.Overview: Pure documentation append. Add five RC3-validation lessons as a new top-level '## RC3 Validation on Windows (2026-04)' section at the end of `meta/lessons.md`. The issue body contains drop-in markdown content, byte-for-byte, that matches the house style (issue citation header, numbered sub-lessons, RFC 2119 keywords, inline cross-refs). No other file changes; no whitespace churn on existing sections. PR against `phase2/vbrief-cutover`; squash-merge to match history. See GitHub issue #576 for the full drop-in content and execution notes.

references.title: Issue #576: docs(meta/lessons): codify 5 RC3 validation lessons
